archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon / Tech) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High Contrast)

brand.name: FacelessForge
brand.tagline: Turn any idea into a YouTube-ready content package.

layout.structure: left sidebar navigation, top status bar, dense dashboard body
layout.spacing: tight (gap-4 or gap-6) for control room feel
layout.topbar: h-16 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-50

components.card: rounded-none md:rounded-sm border border-zinc-800 bg-[#121212] p-6 shadow-none
components.button_primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black hover:bg-[#33EFFF] rounded-none md:rounded-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.button_secondary: border border-zinc-800 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-none md:rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.status_badge: font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 uppercase tracking-wider
components.input: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-zinc-800 rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-[#00E5FF] text-white
components.table: dense layout text-sm border-collapse border-b border-zinc-800 on rows hover:bg-[#1A1A1A]
components.quality_score: flex items-center gap-2 font-mono text-lg text-[#00FF66] border-l-2 border-[#00FF66] pl-3
components.cost_tracker: font-mono text-sm text-[#A1A1AA] flex items-center gap-2
components.scene_timeline: relative border-l border-zinc-800 ml-3 pl-6 space-y-6 before:absolute before:w-2 before:h-2 before:bg-zinc-800 before:-left-[5px] before:top-2
components.script_editor: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800 p-4 font-main text-zinc-300 leading-relaxed rounded-sm

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #27272A (zinc-800) globally to establish grid and structure.
visual_enhancers.gradients: BANNED. Use flat matte colors only.
visual_enhancers.shadows: BANNED. Rely on borders for separation.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Text color shifts to white, borders shift to zinc-600 or primary cyan.

media.instructions: Use provided image URLs for placeholders in Asset Library and Thumbnail concepts.

images.description: Dark abstract texture for background assets

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the matte black (#0A0A0A/#121212) background scheme. Do not use generic Tailwind 'gray', 'slate', or any gradients.
JetBrains Mono MUST be used exclusively for: Status Badges, Timestamps, Metrics/Scores, and Cost tracking.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based) for testing.
Cards and Buttons must not exceed `rounded-sm`. Remove all box-shadows. The app should feel flat, technical, and 'sharp'.
Use a 'Control Room' grid layout: tight gaps (gap-4), high data density, leaving no awkward empty vertical spaces.
Render workflow should use a clean, horizontal steps or vertical timeline implementation utilizing the `scene_timeline` specifications.
Implement lucide-react with standard 1.25 stroke width for minimal icon presence.
Override default Shadcn UI classes extensively: remove their default shadows, roundness, and slate/gray backgrounds.
Always rely on 1px borders (border-zinc-800) for container separation, not shadows or background color changes.
